content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.76% with Bank Nifty -0.94% and VIX elevated at 18.52 — broad market under pressure but selective momentum in defence (HAL +6.5%), capital goods (BHEL +8.2%), realty results plays (SOBHA), and chemicals. Existing book is 49% deployed with small +0.35% intraday — focus is on managing existing positions and trailing SLs on winners rather than aggressive new admissions in a weak tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24138
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding at +6.3%. Current SL 1029 already locks in ~+4.5% gain (above breakeven entry 984), well above the 1.0% trail-gap floor below CMP 1046 (gap ~1.7%). Q4 strong (PAT +19.2%, GNPA 0.93%), Motilal Buy. No-op MODIFY check: SL stays at 1029 since tightening further would breach 1% floor. Actually no change — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge at -2.6%, SL 119 intact (~2.4% below CMP 121.87). Gold structurally bullish (JPM $5,000/oz target, Goldman $5,400). Hold through volatility — thesis is multi-week defensive carry, not a momentum trade."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +4.49% today on April cargo +15% YoY and FY26 beat. CMP 1731.70, current SL 1710 already at breakeven+. Stored SL 1710 vs CMP 1731.70 = 1.25% gap, just above the 1% floor. No change to SL/target — effectively HOLD; not emitting numeric change. Reclassifying as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At -2.4%, CMP 13430 vs SL 13400 — close to SL but record April sales (+33% YoY) and Rs 140 dividend support thesis. SL is the stop; let it work. Not loosening, not tightening (SL above the 5% max-distance from entry would be invalid; current SL 13400 is the bar). Position will resolve itself at SL or on bounce."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +2.99% today, CMP 205.70 vs entry 209. Q4 PAT +68% YoY. SL 204 is intact (0.8% below CMP — slightly under 1% floor but the position is at slight loss so cannot trail higher). Recognising no actual change — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +6.45% today (intraday) but position only +1.1% from entry 4575. SL 4555 intact. Defence catalyst strong (Iran escalation, new CMD, Rs 15 lakh cr sector order book). However Q4 results May 14 is a binary catalyst within ~6 sessions — outside the 3-session window for now, so HOLD with current SL is acceptable. Will reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "new_target": 410.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 365 to 372 after BHEL +8.2% intraday move (Q4 PAT +156% YoY, MS Overweight). CMP 381.30, new SL 372 = 2.4% below CMP (above 1% floor). Locks in better risk position. Tightening only — guardrails compliant. Current SL 365 to new SL 372 = +1.9% tighten."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results announced today (May 5): PAT +124% YoY, Rs 6 dividend, record sales bookings — bullish. Stock gapped up to 1577 then faded to 1472 (-0.7% from entry). SL 1420 intact (~3.6% below CMP). Hold through post-results digestion; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 announced April 30 (PAT Rs 663 cr, Rs 8.60 dividend) — earnings binary already passed. 7.7x volume yesterday signals institutional accumulation. CMP 6870 vs entry 6900, -0.5%. SL 6650 intact (~3.2% below CMP). Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already locks in +4.5%; gap to CMP 1046 is 1.7% — within trail-gap discipline. No action required."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge at small loss; SL 119 ~2.4% below CMP. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 already at breakeven+; gap to CMP 1731 is 1.25%. Don't tighten further or risk forced exit on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At -2.4%, near SL 13400. Strong fundamentals (April sales +33% YoY) but tape weak. Let SL resolve."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position slightly negative; cannot loosen SL; current 204 is the natural stop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting May 14 — 6 sessions out, just outside binary event window. Will tighten/exit closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 372.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 365 to 372 after intraday +8.2% pop on Q4 beat; locks in slightly better risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary passed today with strong print; SL 1420 gives room for post-results digestion."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already announced; institutional accumulation signal strong; SL 6650 well-placed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL/HAL/RRKABEL/CEMPRO all extended after big single-day moves on Q4 results — chasing into +8% to +14% intraday rallies in a -0.76% Nifty tape is the wrong risk profile. Will revisit on consolidation/pullback. CEMPRO's 14.6x volume is intriguing but the stock is at 52-week high with no margin of safety. HFC, PSU banking, and chemicals clusters are already represented in the book — adding correlated names breaches cluster discipline. NIFTYBEES not adding here — Nifty below 50DMA, defensive entry better at 23,800 support.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 49% deployed across 9 names — diversified across HFC, gold ETF, ports, auto, banking, defence, capital goods, realty, chemicals. Net unrealized +₹2,577 (+0.26%). Cluster check: Capital Goods (HAL + BHEL) ~12% of book — under 20% cluster cap. No single binary event within 3 sessions except HAL Q4 May 14 (will reassess Day 18-19). On a weak-tape day with VIX elevated, the right move is risk management on existing book, not new admissions. Trades today (9) already high — discipline says no more entries unless an A+ setup emerges. Performance context shows 18% win rate with 2.4x profit factor — winners are being held longer than losers, which is the correct asymmetry; continue."
}
